doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), cites a non-existent prior EDPB guidance, and advances a legal position contradicting established EDPB doctrine that pseudonymized data remains personal data under GDPR.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document is dated March 2026 (a future date), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014 on anonymization techniques," misattributes the IAB Europe case citation, and the substantive legal position in §2–§3 contradicts well-established EDPB doctrine that pseudonymized data remains personal data under GDPR—no such guidance exists in the EDPB's published registry.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), cites a non-existent prior EDPB guidance, and advances a legal position contradicting established EDPB doctrine that pseudonymized data remains personal data under GDPR.
